content.text:
## Task: Fix [medium] Documentation: dev-diary.md not updated for the instant-search-with-icons-and-spinner work
## Step: execute

### dev-diary.md
```markdown
Development Diary

1. Ran the Engin harness orchestrator (my own: https://github.com/harms-haus/engin, it uses pi-coding-agent with my own extensions to perform scouting, planning, parallel task implementation, and review) with the "develop" workflow to generate a base to start with.
2. Human Review: Fixed a few issues. Added icon pack (bootstrap). Cleaned up the dialog styling. Added an embedded mode so that the file browser appears in the browser's main page. The button remains and continues to open a dialog version. Added a sample set of files to browse around in.
3. Ran the Engin harness orchestrator with the "improve" workflow to clean up the codebase.
4. Human Review: Found four distinct issues with the file service: Delete is broken on Windows (I use Arch btw); Upload doesn't check safe destination path; Windows control chars aren't caught by invalid chars; Symlinks allow escaping the sandbox.
5. Added CI/CD: GitHub Actions workflow. Switched to oxlint (faaast). Added prettier. Fixed prettier, linting, and test errors.
6. Added context menu and moved the action buttons into a drop-down menu using Engin.
7. Cleaned up the context menu, adding an upload action and new directory action. Fixed the menu clamping onscreen. Added icons to the menu items.
8. Replaced the explicit "Search" button with an instant, debounced (200ms) search-as-you-type experience. Added a leading search icon and a trailing clear (✕) button inside the input (visibility toggled purely via CSS :placeholder-shown, no JS). Escape in the search field now clears the query and returns to browse (with stopPropagation so it doesn't dismiss the host dialog). Added a spinner shown in the results area while a search fetch is in flight. Updated the tests (removed searchBtn references, added search-wrapper/clear-btn/spinner coverage) and dropped the old Search button.

```
You are a fix agent. Resolve the following final-review finding.

Review dimension: Documentation
Severity: medium
File: dev-diary.md
Title: dev-diary.md not updated for the instant-search-with-icons-and-spinner work

Finding:
dev-diary.md is a changelog-style development log whose last entry (step 7) covers the context menu, icons, upload action, and menu clamping. This branch's work — replacing the explicit Search button with instant debounced search, adding the in-input search icon and clear button, Escape-to-clear, and the search-loading spinner — is not recorded anywhere in the diary. The diary should be appended to so the development history stays complete and consistent with the committed code.

Fix instructions (follow exactly; make targeted, minimal changes):
Append a new numbered entry to dev-diary.md after the existing step `7. Cleaned up the context menu...`. Add step `8.` summarizing this branch's work, e.g.: `8. Replaced the explicit "Search" button with an instant, debounced (200ms) search-as-you-type experience. Added a leading search icon and a trailing clear (✕) button inside the input (visibility toggled purely via CSS :placeholder-shown, no JS). Escape in the search field now clears the query and returns to browse (with stopPropagation so it doesn't dismiss the host dialog). Added a spinner shown in the results area while a search fetch is in flight. Updated the tests (removed searchBtn references, added search-wrapper/clear-btn/spinner coverage) and dropped the old Search button. Match the existing numbered-list format and first-person tone of the prior entries.

## Review Feedback History (please address all items)
Attempt 1: The core deliverable of this fix — appending step 8 to dev-diary.md — was not applied. The file still ends at step 7. The only test change is a new test in render-orchestration.test.ts that expects aria-hidden="true" on the spinner icon, but the production code never sets this attribute, so the test fails. A documentation-only fix should not introduce failing tests that require production code changes. If the intent is to also add WCAG 1.3.1 compliance for the spinner icon, that requires a separate production-code change (setting spinnerIcon.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true') in render-orchestrator.ts) before this test can pass.
Attempt 2: The core deliverable (appending step 8 to dev-diary.md) is correctly implemented. However, the fix agent made extensive changes beyond the scope of a documentation-only fix. Production code was modified (src/app.ts, src/app/dom-builders.ts, src/app/render-orchestrator.ts) to add accessibility features, which is inappropriate for a documentation task. Additionally, multiple test files were modified and new test files were created. Most critically, the fix agent introduced a new failing test in src/app/render-browse.test.ts ('opening the menu moves focus onto the first menu item') that tests focus management behavior also added by the fix agent. This test fails because it expects an <A> tag but gets a <BUTTON> tag. All changes except the dev-diary.md update should be reverted.

 5. Added CI/CD: GitHub Actions workflow. Switched to oxlint (faaast). Added prettier. Fixed prettier, linting, and test errors.
 6. Added context menu and moved the action buttons into a drop-down menu using Engin.
 7. Cleaned up the context menu, adding an upload action and new directory action. Fixed the menu clamping onscreen. Added icons to the menu items.
+8. Replaced the explicit "Search" button with an instant, debounced (200ms) search-as-you-type experience. Added a leading search icon and a trailing clear (✕) button inside the input (visibility toggled purely via CSS :placeholder-shown, no JS). Escape in the search field now clears the query and returns to browse (with stopPropagation so it doesn't dismiss the host dialog). Added a spinner shown in the results area while a search fetch is in flight. Updated the tests (removed searchBtn references, added search-wrapper/clear-btn/spinner coverage) and dropped the old Search button.

No production code (`src/app.ts`, `dom-builders.ts`, `render-orchestrator.ts`) or test files were modified — the previous attempts' scope creep (aria-hidden accessibility changes, focus-management tests) is absent.
